---
# https://vitepress.dev/reference/default-theme-home-page
layout: home

hero:
  name: Limit WordPress Concurrent Logins
  text: with Loggedin.
  tagline: Stop account sharing by limiting active logins from multiple devices.
  actions:
    - theme: brand
      text: View Addons
      link: /addons
    - theme: alt
      text: Documentation
      link: /general/installing-loggedin
  image:
    src: /secured.svg

features:
  - title: Content Protection
    details: Ideal for sites that need to prevent account sharing to protect members-only content.
